message:
test: add search asset harness, provenance normalization tests, and conversation_id field updates

Add the new search_asset_harness test module providing reusable infrastructure
for validating search-asset lifecycle behaviour (self-healing, fallback, upgrade,
corruption recovery). This harness gives downstream tests deterministic synthetic
corpora, corruption injectors, golden queries, and structured logging instead of
building ad-hoc fixtures.

Also extend cli_dispatch_coverage with comprehensive provenance normalization
tests for the timeline and sessions commands:
- timeline_json_normalizes_remote_provenance_without_source_row verifies that
  remote sessions with blank origin_kind still get correct source_id/origin_kind
- timeline_json_derives_remote_source_id_from_origin_host_when_source_id_blank
  tests fallback derivation from origin_host
- timeline_human_output_does_not_badge_trimmed_local_source_id ensures whitespace-
  padded "local" source IDs do not produce spurious [local] badges
- sessions_json_keeps_local_file_metadata_for_trimmed_local_source_id verifies
  that sessions with whitespace-padded local source IDs retain file metadata
- Multiple additional sessions_json tests for remote provenance normalization

Update conversation_id: None in all existing test hit constructors (search_perf
bench, ranking tests, cross_workstream, perf_proptest) to match the new
SearchHit field.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1698,6 +1698,7 @@ fn make_session_hit(content_hash: u64, line_number: usize, content: String) -> S
         source_id: "local".into(),
         origin_kind: "local".into(),
         origin_host: None,
+        conversation_id: None,
     }
 }
